title: coriaria × sarlurida
intro: Coriaria × sarlurida, also known as the Mountain Sorrel, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Coriariaceae. It is native to the mountains of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Coriaria × sarlurida can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote health and well-being, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion.
